speaker: speaker1
text: I'm looking for a string of pearls for my wife .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , sir . What price range do you have in mind ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm not sure . I don't know very much about the price of pearls .

speaker: speaker2
text: I see . Let me show you some samples of various qualities . This one is very nice . It's three hundred and fifty dollars .

speaker: speaker2
text: We are having a sale now . The price has already gone down .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's two hundred and eighty dollars .

speaker: speaker1
text: OK . I'll take it . Thank you .
